proof_type: current-source helper and focused contract tests
proven: Current source does not infer Gemma audio support from audio_config, token ids, or embed_audio projection-only weights.
Current source gates the checked 12B JANG4M, 12B MXFP4, 26B JANG4M, and 31B JANG4M bundles to text/vision/video rather than audio.
Gemma4 Unified loader contract now distinguishes missing runtime fallback from source-runtime-available native path in tests.
not_proven: Installed-app parity for the stale 12B audio proof is not green.
Audio generation is not proven for 12B/26B/31B JANG4M or MXFP4 bundles without audio_tower weights.
The broader Gemma inventory gate remains open until all required smoke/media rows are green.
Video capability still requires runtime-proven frame-through-vision evidence, not metadata alone.
parallel_agent_next: Do not advertise audio for Gemma bundles unless audio_tower.* weights exist and live E2E audio proof passes.
Treat older installed-app audio rows that reached an empty audio turn as stale/red until rebuilt from current source and reproven.
For E2B/E4B bundles with audio_tower weights, run real audio E2E; do not generalize those results to 12B/26B/31B projection-only/no-audio bundles.
Keep Gemma video claims tied to actual frame-through-vision runtime proof.
